query:
-- Apollo credits this month
SELECT 
  SUM(creditsUsed) as monthlyTotal,
  COUNT(*) as totalCalls,
  SUM(CASE WHEN action = 'reveal' THEN creditsUsed ELSE 0 END) as revealCredits,
  SUM(CASE WHEN action = 'verify_email' THEN creditsUsed ELSE 0 END) as verifyCredits
FROM apolloCreditLog
WHERE createdAt > DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01');
